sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out for the 2025 Bahrain Grand Prix. Oscar Piastri holds pole position with his McLaren teammate Lando Norris down in P6. Charles Leclerc joins Piastri on the front row. (13.04)

sky.f1.uk.title: Saudi Arabian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Jeddah for the 2025 Saudi Arabian Grand Prix. Reigning world champion Max Verstappen crossed the finish line in P1 last season at the Jeddah Corniche Circuit. (20.04)

sky.f1.uk.title: Miami F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: Polesitter Max Verstappen is joined by Lando Norris and Kimi Antonelli heading into turn one, while Lewis Hamilton tries to fight through the field from P12. (04.05)

sky.f1.uk.title: Emilia Romagna F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Imola for the 2025 Emilia Romagna Grand Prix. Last season, reigning world champion Max Verstappen held off a late Lando Norris charge to claim race victory. (18.05)

sky.f1.uk.title: Monaco F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: On the streets of Monte Carlo, the 2025 Monaco Grand Prix arrives. Lando Norris lines up in P1 with Charles Leclerc behind him as the Monegasque pursues back-to-back home wins. (25.05)

sky.f1.uk.title: Spanish F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's an all-papaya front row as McLaren lead the way with Oscar Piastri from Lando Norris. Max Verstappen and George Russell form the second row, while Lewis Hamilton starts P5. (01.06)

sky.f1.uk.title: Canadian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out for the Canadian Grand Prix as George Russell and Max Verstappen line-up alongside each other at the front with Oscar Piastri in third. Lando Norris comes from P7. (15.06)

sky.f1.uk.title: Austrian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: Lando Norris bounces back to take pole alongside Charles Leclerc. Oscar Piastri and Lewis Hamilton share row two, while Max Verstappen starts down in P7 for Red Bull's home race. (29.06)

sky.f1.uk.title: British F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Silverstone. Max Verstappen shares the front row with Oscar Piastri, while Brits Lando Norris, George Russell and Lewis Hamilton round out the top five. (06.07)

sky.f1.uk.title: Belgian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Spa. With eyes on the weather, Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri lock out the front, while Charles Leclerc starts P3. Lewis Hamilton bids to fight through the field. (27.07)

sky.f1.uk.title: Hungarian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at the Hungaroring. As Charles Leclerc goes up against the McLarens from pole, both Max Verstappen and Lewis Hamilton face tough recovery drives from further back. (03.08)

sky.f1.uk.title: Dutch F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out in Zandvoort. Pipping his team mate to pole, Oscar Piastri leads Lando Norris as Max Verstappen looks to spring a surprise from P3 with Isack Hadjar for company. (31.08)

sky.f1.uk.title: Italian F1 GP Highlights
sky.f1.uk.description: It's lights out at Monza. Max Verstappen holds pole from title contenders Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri as Charles Leclerc leads the Ferrari charge with Lewis Hamilton down in P10. (07.09)

sky.mix.uk.title: WPL Final Highlights

sky.mix.uk.title: S/Lge: Warrington v St Helens
sky.mix.uk.description: Paul Rowley's St Helens reign begins at Warrington's Halliwell Jones Stadium during round one of Betfred Super League action. Warrington need a strong start after disappointment in 2025.

sky.mix.uk.title: My Icon: Rachel Yankey

sky.mix.uk.title: 2025 Season Review
sky.mix.uk.description: As the 2025 chapter in Formula 1 history came to a close with Lando Norris claiming a maiden world championship, join the Sky Sports F1 team for an in-depth review of the season.

sky.mix.uk.title: Live WSL: Man Utd v London City
sky.mix.uk.description: In the Barclays WSL, Manchester United play host to the London City Lionesses. Marc Skinner's side recorded a third straight WSL victory last week, closing the gap to leaders City.

sky.mix.uk.title: PL Darts: Antwerp
sky.mix.uk.description: Antwerp stages night two as Luke Humphries and Luke Littler face off in a repeat of the 2025 Premier League final. Plus, MVG plays Josh Rock and Gerwyn Price battles Gian van Veen.

sky.mix.uk.title: WTA Final: Doha
sky.mix.uk.description: Victoria Mboko, one of the game's rising stars, eyes her second WTA 1000 crown after last year's Montreal breakthrough as the 19-year-old meets Karolina Muchova. (14.02)

Blaze.uk.description: Unidentified submerged objects have allegedly been sighted since the days of Christopher Columbus. Can scientists uncover evidence of USOs?

Blaze.uk.title: UFO Files
Blaze.uk.description: Alien Engineering (Part 1 of 2): What would happen if a UFO did land on Earth and humans found it? Engineers create a 'spaceship' to see how alien technology could work. (S1, ep 14)

Blaze.uk.title: UFO Files
Blaze.uk.description: Alien Engineering (Part 2 of 2): Laser weapons and tele-transporters would probably all be fitted to an alien spaceship, but what if they could be used by humans too? (S1, ep 15)

Blaze.uk.title: Container Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Shark Attack: Mo and Ty, AKA 'Team Muscle', make their move and go on the attack. (S1, ep 8)

Blaze.uk.title: Container Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Big Guns: A mysterious container from Guam has the competition ready for battle. Manic Matt fires a warning shot, but the Israelis aren't backing down. (S1, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Rust Valley Restorers
Blaze.uk.description: Mike M.I.A: Mike works at remote locations for his rock scaling business, while trying to manage the shop's restoration of a 1969 Road Runner convertible from afar. (S1, ep 2)

Blaze.uk.title: Junk & Disorderly
Blaze.uk.description: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back! This time they head to Dorset to meet Tim, the owner of a delectable collection of trinkets. (S3, ep 7)

Blaze.uk.title: Junk & Disorderly
Blaze.uk.description: Henry Cole, Allen Millyard and Guy Willison are back! This time, they head for Mark's shed in Shrewsbury to pick up a pile of trinkets. (S3, ep 8)

Blaze.uk.title: Junk & Disorderly
Blaze.uk.description: The vintage restorers continue to challenge themselves to make money out of other people's automotive junk and classic collectables. (S4, ep 2)

Blaze.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
Blaze.uk.description: Citroen 2CV: The guys are looking for any French car that is not a 2CV - but once they come across this one, it's impossible to turn down. (S3, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars Do America
Blaze.uk.description: Lone Star Stakes: With the help of a few trusted companions, Rick, Corey and Chum hope to round up some gems in Austin, Texas. (S1, ep 7)

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars Do America
Blaze.uk.description: Sweet Carolina: Rick, Corey and Chum bring their road trip to an end in Winston-Salem, North Carolina, and come across antique tractors, test fire weapons and a NASCAR legend. (S1, ep 8)

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars
Blaze.uk.description: Rick's Big Shot: A seller comes in with an overcoat once owned by Lee Harvey Oswald, Corey checks out a 30-year-old Gibson guitar and Rick and Corey check out a WWII half-track.

Blaze.uk.title: Auction Hunters
Blaze.uk.description: Gangs Of New York: Ton and Allen take on a local thrift store gang in Brooklyn. The guys discover a classic arcade redemption game and a mid-century water cannon. (S3, ep 14)

Blaze.uk.title: Auction Hunters
Blaze.uk.description: The Jersey Score: Ton and Allen are made to feel unwelcome at a silent auction in New Jersey. They uncover a vintage vehicle and a skeet throwing machine from the 1960s. (S3, ep 15)

Blaze.uk.title: Auction Hunters
Blaze.uk.description: Bowling Pin Payday: Allen and Ton go head-to-head with a trash-talking auction buyer. They find a 19th century rifle and a mechanical bowling pinsetter from the 1960s. (S3, ep 16)

Blaze.uk.title: Auction Hunters
Blaze.uk.description: Allen's Got Balls: After returning to LA, Ton and Allen butt heads with a familiar old foe. They also discover a driving range golf ball picker vehicle. (S3, ep 17)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Locktoberfest: Darrell and Brandon have high hopes as they return to the site of their biggest score. The others bid to take down the self-proclaimed "King of Montebello". (S7, ep 12)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: My Little Brony: The action shifts to Oceanside, where Rene plans to make the others pay for crashing his home turf. Darrell and Brandon fight for a piece of film history. (S7, ep 13)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Up The Ante In El Monte: Big lockers mean big money in El Monte where Brandi and Jarrod try to play the other buyers. But what happens if their scheme backfires? (S7, ep 14)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: All Along The Swatchtower: Jarrod's antics push Brandi to her limits as the auctions move to Koreatown. With highend merchandise up for grabs, Dave intends to score big. (S7, ep 15)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: A San Marcos Mitzvah: The auction action moves to Darrell and Brandon's home turf, where Mary comes up with her own way to deal with inflated prices. (S7, ep 16)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: North Hollywood Hustle: Even Dan and Laura fail to escape the fierce competition at locker auctions in North Hollywood. (S7, ep 17)

Blaze.uk.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
Blaze.uk.description: Abbey Road: While the team uncovers a surprising find on Lot Five, members of the Fellowship arrive in Europe and immediately discover more Templar connections. (S11, ep 22)

Blaze.uk.title: Secrets In The Ice
Blaze.uk.description: The Patagonia Ice Dragon: A Dutch fluit shipwreck found in the Gulf of Finland reveals rare insights into 1600s maritime trade and naval architecture. (S4, ep 6)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Death Coast
Blaze.uk.description: The Hunt Begins: Jeff MacKinnon searches the Death Coast for Le Chameau, an 18th-century shipwreck carrying a fortune in rare coins (S1, ep 1)

Blaze.uk.title: Secrets Of The Lost Liners
Blaze.uk.description: Andrea Doria: Lacking in speed and might, the SS Andrea Doria more than made up for it in beauty, but on the night of 25 July 1956 - the Italian liner met a disastrous fate. (3 of 6)

Blaze.uk.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid
Blaze.uk.description: Mysterious Sacred Structures: The history and perplexing mysteries behind some of the world's most sacred and holy relics. (S1, ep 7)

Blaze.uk.title: History's Greatest Mysteries
Blaze.uk.description: The Phoenix Lights Phenomenon: Delve into the popular theories behind the Phoenix Lights phenomena, a series of widely sighted UFOs observed in Arizona and Nevada back in 1997. (S4, ep 5)

Blaze.uk.title: Paranormal: Caught On Camera
Blaze.uk.description: Ghosts flock to a quaint coastal farmhouse. A pastor's sermon is interrupted by the Devil himself and a woman and her dogs have multiple terrifying encounters with Bigfoot. (S8, ep 6)

Blaze.uk.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
Blaze.uk.description: Trapped: A shape-shifting creature stalks a young girl, a boy fears he has no one to turn to when he begins to see shadow people and two friends are terrorized by an evil spirit. (S1, ep 8)

Blaze.uk.title: The Proof Is Out There
Blaze.uk.description: Men in Black Calls, Old Kentucky Aliens, and Mysterious Eclipse: What is the identity of a bizarre creature spotted on a driveway? And did the Men in Black threaten a man? (S4, ep 3)

Blaze.uk.title: Secret Restoration
Blaze.uk.description: Robot Surfing: The entire team pitches in to transform disassembled 1980s animatronic figures into a horse-themed robot band. Meanwhile, a surfboard meets its maker. (S1, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Secret Restoration
Blaze.uk.description: Best of the Best: Look back on the best of season one, rating everything from the coolest rides restored, to the most valuable, and the most rock and roll. (S1, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
Blaze.uk.description: Ilkeston 3: Join David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal, or will they take a chance at auction instead? (S10, ep 65)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Canadian Pickers
Blaze.uk.description: The pickers find mounds of treasure and steep prices on Vancouver Island. Scott and Sheldon devise a special purchasing strategy. (S3, ep 1)

Blaze.uk.title: Junk & Disorderly
Blaze.uk.description: ...Henry and Sam's Wreck-trospective. Henry and Sam head to an automotive show in Chippenham. (S1, ep 8)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: North Hollywood Hustle: Even Dan and Laura fail to escape the fierce competition at locker auctions in North Hollywood. (S7, ep 17)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Who Let the Daves Out?: Dave draws on the help of friends at vault auctions in Huntingdon Beach. Meanwhile, Mary's inexperience shows when she struggles to secure a lot. (S7, ep 19)

Blaze.uk.title: Hardcore Pawn
Blaze.uk.description: Kill Em All: Les is furious to find broken merchandise in the pawn shop and throws the book at his staff. He issues a threat for the next person who steps out of line. (S6, ep 12)

Blaze.uk.title: Hardcore Pawn
Blaze.uk.description: Rich Vs Les: Tensions run high after Les threatens to fire the next employee. It's Rich who makes the fatal error, leading to the biggest showdown in the history of the store. (S6, ep 13)

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars
Blaze.uk.description: To Infinity and Be-Pawned!: The owner of a massive collection of Toy Story toys has high hopes for big money, but Corey's expert reveals some key details that are missing.

Blaze.uk.title: Deep Water Salvage
Blaze.uk.description: Savage Salvage: John Ward and his crew attempt to salvage a barge upturned by a storm in a canal. Hickory Scuba Divers work to salvage a sailboat that's sunk at its mooring. (S2, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: Salvage Kings
Blaze.uk.description: Here's to the Future of Flashback: Ted looks back over his first year in business and the team prepares the station for a big open house to cap off the year. (S3, ep 8)

Blaze.uk.title: Canadian Pickers
Blaze.uk.description: The pickers find mounds of treasure and steep prices on Vancouver Island. Scott and Sheldon devise a special purchasing strategy. (S3, ep 1)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Lock & Roll: Ivy sets his sights on a locker load of collectibles at auctions in Mission Hills. Meanwhile, local buyers test Darrell and Mary hopes for a quick sale. (S7, ep 18)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: Gambler Of Thrones: There are big money finds at auctions in Palm Springs. Ivy sets his sights on vintage goodies. Meanwhile, rivals Darrell and Rene go into battle. (S7, ep 20)

Blaze.uk.title: Junk & Disorderly
Blaze.uk.description: ...Henry and Sam's Wreck-trospective. Henry and Sam try to make a profit on memorabilia at the Bristol Classic Car Show. (S1, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Ancient Aliens
Blaze.uk.description: Alien Air Force: Since 2017, the Navy has been releasing photos and videos of UFOs. Theorists suggest the images are nearly identical to accounts from centuries ago. (S14, ep 7)

Blaze.uk.title: Close Encounters
Blaze.uk.description: An Australian banana farmer spots a saucer-shaped UFO rising out of a swamp in 1966. That same year in Victoria, a man veers off the road while distracted by lights in the sky. (S1, ep 9)

Blaze.uk.title: Close Encounters
Blaze.uk.description: A policeman hears a loud roar and sees an oval-shaped UFO in New Mexico in 1964. In 1994, a postal worker in Frankfurt spots an aura of light and a luminous object in the sky. (S1, ep 10)

Blaze.uk.title: Pawn Stars
Blaze.uk.description: That's the Way the Cookie Crumbles: Rick calls in a special guest to authenticate a Mick Foley T-shirt. Meanwhile, a seller walks in with an McDonald's cookie from the 1980s.

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: The Hunch-Back of La Habra: The buyers try their luck at a new La Habra facility where Ivy teaches them a lesson. Meanwhile, Dusty brews himself up an interesting unit. (S14, ep 1)

Blaze.uk.title: Storage Wars
Blaze.uk.description: The 300th Times the Charm!: Brandi and Lisa's friendship is tested as they go head-to-head on a pair of lockers. Kenny sets his fears aside and takes the plunge on a unit. (S14, ep 2)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Dickinson's Real Deal
Blaze.uk.description: Ilkeston 4: Join David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal, or will they take a chance at auction instead? (S10, ep 66)

Blaze.uk.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
Blaze.uk.description: Cone E Island: While a trip to Europe uncovers new signs connecting the Templars to Scandinavian culture, a clue found beneath a Nolan's Cross boulder may offer answers. (S11, ep 23)

Blaze.uk.title: New: Secrets In The Ice
Blaze.uk.description: Ice Age Battlefield: A Swiss fisherman uncovers ancient Celtic relics in Lake Neuchatel, hinting at a violent Iron Age battle around 225 BCE. (S4, ep 7)

Blaze.uk.title: Forbidden History
Blaze.uk.description: Christ and the Crucifixion: The Real Evidence: Delve into the new theories that shed light - or cast doubt - on the Crucifixion. Is there any real archaeological evidence?  (S7, ep 6)

DMAXUK.uk.description: Lady Luck. The baggage battlers head to an esteemed estate sale in St. Paul, where they bid on items ranging from automotive parts and a rare doll to a hockey mascot costume. S3, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.description: Blow Up. The baggage battlers head to an unclaimed crate auction Tucson, Arizona and things really heat up when one of the experts tests a vintage bomb detonator. S3, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.description: Mike Tyson's Punch Out. The baggage battlers head to an estate auction in Jacksonville, Florida, where pop culture collectibles and sealed boxes are amongst the items on offer. S3, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.description: Two-Faced. The baggage battlers head to a police auction in Stockton, California, where one of the auction specialists discover a mask mould of a famous Hollywood icon. S3, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.description: Guns a-Blazin'. The baggage battlers head to a cowboy auction in California, where they duel over items dating back to the legendary Buffalo Bill and the Barnum & Bailey circuses. S3, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: No Replacement For Displacement. Wayne buys the ultimate dream car: an all-original 1955 Mercedes 300 SL 'Gullwing' that's been hidden from the public eye for decades. S11, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: (AC) Ace In The Hole. Wayne is in Virginia to help sell an impeccable 1958 AC Ace Bristol roadster. In California, a 1968 Toyota Corona makes an unforgettable impression. S11, Ep4

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: 3 Million Mile Volvo. Wayne lifts the lid on a Volvo that holds the world record for the highest mileage. Plus, he reverse engineers a gearless transmission for a 1912 Cartercar. S11, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Chasing Classic Cars
DMAXUK.uk.description: Shouldn't Be Selling It. At auction, Wayne works with a collector who has last-minute doubts about selling his collection. Plus, Wayne's '30 Ford Model A faces stiff competition. S11, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: Land Of 10,000 Bitchin' Rides. Kevin and Dave prepare for the biggest car show in America. At the annual Back To The '50s, over 10,000 cars descend on St. Paul, MN. S4, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: If It Was Easy, Anyone Could Do It. A 1967 Chevelle with Great 8 pedigree and high hopes is Kindig It's next challenge. Dave learns the hard way that builds don't always go to plan. S4, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Kindig Customs
DMAXUK.uk.description: A Family Affair. The team aims to give Charity's dad the retirement gift of a lifetime, converting a '57 Corvette into something special. Can the kids get motivated to help? S4, Ep12

DMAXUK.uk.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
DMAXUK.uk.description: Alfasud: A Rare Revival. Ant uncovers an extremely rare 1980 Alfasud that's been locked away for 35 years. But he learns reawakening the engine proves problematic. S1, Ep5

DMAXUK.uk.title: Ant Anstead: Born Mechanic
DMAXUK.uk.description: MG Midget: Teenage Dreams. Ant finds a 1977 MG Midget 1500, just like the first car he restored as a teen. With tight margins and a rust issue, he pulls in his family to help. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Mysteries Of The Deep
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bermuda Triangle Doomsday. Jeremy explores a new theory that could explain what happens in the world's most infamous stretch of water. Is this enduring mystery about to be solved? S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Mysteries Of The Deep
DMAXUK.uk.description: Nazi Toxic Hell Sub. Jeremy explores a perfectly preserved 140-year-old wreck at the bottom of the Great Lakes. And, what's the dark secret buried inside a Nazi submarine? S1, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Bigfoot. Experts discuss theories related to the world's most famous cryptid, Bigfoot. Recently uncovered evidence unveils a creature far fiercer than previously believed. S1, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: In Search Of Monsters
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Loch Ness Monster. Experts explore a new theory surrounding Scotland's Loch Ness Monster. The creature may not only be real, but possibly more dangerous than ever imagined. S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: An American Werewolf. The team respond to reports of a half-man, half-beast in Wisconsin. Attacks and sightings of the Beast of Bray Road have left locals scared for three decades. S2, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition X
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Beast Of Bray Road. Josh, Jess and Phil are looking for a werewolf-like creature in Wisconsin. Eyewitness accounts have led them on their quest to a remote forest. S2, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.description: Aliens Of The Deep. Video captured by the U.S. Navy triggers Jess and Phil's investigation into mysterious, supersonic craft flying above the waters off California's Catalina Island. S2, Ep11

DMAXUK.uk.title: Gold Divers
DMAXUK.uk.description: Dredge of Insanity Part 2. Kris attempts to save his season with a move that may be his worst idea yet. Shawn hunts for a pay streak to solidify his position at the top. S10, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Neville Perry returns to the legendary German Gully with unfinished business. Salty and Alan head to the world's biggest monocline in search of gold. S9, Ep1

DMAXUK.uk.title: Jeremy Wade's Dark Waters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Cold Water Mystery. Fisherman and adventurer, Jeremy Wade, is with a commercial fishing boat in Alaska, searching for giant halibut. Will they catch the sought-after 50-lb halibut? S1, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Pain Level Ten. An explosion rocks the Time Bandit, and an emergency sends Keith into rescue mode. Meanwhile, Jake disposes of pots to prevent capsizing. S19, Ep16

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Dead Reckoning. When Sig loses GPS navigation, Mandy must work a decades-old magnetic compass. OJ's replacement on the Wizard makes a misfit crew a bit more awkward. S19, Ep17

DMAXUK.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Columbus Treasure. The discovery of a lifetime becomes a massive salvage operation. Pulling up and verifying Columbus' anchor might be the biggest challenge yet. S1, Ep6

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Fortune Of The Buzzard. Josh Gates is on the trail of the legendary lost treasure of the notorious pirate, The Buzzard - a fortune rumoured to be over a billion dollars. S6, Ep17

DMAXUK.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUK.uk.description: Lost Tomb Of The Mummy. Josh Gates investigates an active dig site in Egypt. He joins renowned archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass, who is on the cusp on an incredible discovery. S6, Ep19

DMAXUK.uk.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Alaskans Unite. Misty must complete her cabin roof without help from Maciah. Marty gives a cabin-warming gift to Mollee, and the family commit to a mini rescue. S1, Ep7

DMAXUK.uk.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Twist Of Fate. With the first winter storm just days away, the Raney clan rush to seal in Misty's cabin. But a devastating fire threatens to derail their plans. S1, Ep8

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Right On The Mark. The Blacklighters' team leader, Mark, is severely injured in a mining accident forcing Paul and John to work overtime on two separate claims. S7, Ep18

DMAXUK.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Good, Bad And Overcooked. The Cheals hit a massive pocket of plate sized opal in their open cut mine. Plus, Brutal Outback temperatures cripple Cozza with severe heat stroke. S7, Ep19

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: Prodigal Son. An additional 15 million dollars in crab sends the fleet into a fishing frenzy. To get ahead, the Time Bandit and Wizard must put a decade old rivalry behind them. S11, Ep2

DMAXUK.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUK.uk.description: The Ultimatum. Huge waves test rookie skipper Josh, but it's fire not water that threatens to sink his Cornelia Marie. On the Wizard, a mutinous crew faces off with Captain Keith. S11, Ep3

DMAXUK.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUK.uk.description: My Deadly Face Tumor. In Sweden, Kim's had dozens of surgeries on a huge facial tumour, but stopped after he almost died. He needs one more operation - can he go through with it? S4, Ep9

DMAXUK.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUK.uk.description: Worlds Biggest Cyst. Khalida goes to a hospital in Kashmir after suffering intense stomach pains. Doctors operate and are astonished to discover the world's biggest ovarian cyst. S4, Ep10

DMAXUK.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUK.uk.description: Prospectors Jacqui and Andrew uncover gold in Queensland. The Poseidon Crew get some exciting news, while the Dust Devils spend big on new equipment. S6, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Saving Lives At Sea
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: At Beachy Head, the Eastbourne crew respond to a base jumper's disastrous take-off. At Loch Ness, a World War II seaplane runs into mechanical trouble. S6, Ep7

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Saving Lives At Sea
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: In Porthdinllaen, a yacht send out a mayday call for an immediate medical evacuation. In Dungeness, the crew help a skipper who has suffered a head injury. S6, Ep8

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: After a frustrating day, the Ferals hit a gold hot streak. An injury rocks the Gold Timers, while Shane and Russell struggle with their homemade sluice. S6, Ep5

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: You've Got Another Sting Coming. On a boiling hot Brazilian island, aggressive anaconda and deadly stingray torment survivalists Whitney and Nathan, pushing them to breaking point. S5, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Naked And Afraid
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Swamp Don't Care. All-stars Jake and Melissa are in a Florida swamp. They face snakes and alligators and when one gets lost, local authorities are called in to rescue to them. S5, Ep7

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Salvage Dawgs
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Peanut Silo Salvage. The team hesitantly take on a salvage in Virginia. After a rather precarious roof removal, they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact. S8, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Knife In The Ribs. The first arctic storm of the season arrives and Saga's deck boss takes a knife to the ribs. Bill tries out a new management style to motivate a lazy greenhorn. S15, Ep4

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Single Point Of Failure. With Mandy alone at the helm, a freak accident threatens the Northwestern crew. And, Harley's launcher snaps at the worst possible moment. S15, Ep5

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Shifting Stack. In the biggest storm of the season, Jake faces a life and death decision. Sig and Mandy haul through angry seas, while Josh and Casey gamble on quota. S15, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Blood In The Water Part 1. Jake must confront his disorderly crew, forcing him to make a tough decision. Meanwhile, Keith deals with a knife injury to one of his deckhands. S15, Ep3

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Misfits put their faith in an ancient bulldozer for the season's last dig. Meanwhile, infighting stalls efforts to unearth the Opal Whisperers' haul. S5, Ep19

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Bushmen risk their lives digging where opal thieves removed the ceiling supports. Meanwhile, the Blacklighters switch to dangerous night mining. S5, Ep20

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Start With A Bang. The Bushmen bring in an explosives expert to blast through the toughest rock in Grawin. A brand-new team brings cutting edge technology to the opal fields. S6, Ep1

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: The Snake Catcher
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: All You Can Eat. Julia helps a customer deal with a python in their garden with a particularly big belly. Plus, Julia and John race to get a python out of a tree. S1, Ep10

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Million Dollar Baby. Patrick and Kirsty unearth a giant million-dollar Amethyst cluster, while Pete and Kyle struggle to extract extremely fragile and rare Crocoite crystals. S1, Ep1

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Hot As Hell. Patrick faces extreme temperatures to recover Australia's biggest-ever, million-dollar Amethyst cluster. In contrast, Pete and Kyle struggle in frigid conditions. S1, Ep2

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Gold Gypsies make a discovery that could finally catapult their season. Meanwhile, the Victoria Diggers hit red tape, pushing Neville to the edge. S5, Ep4

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Poseidon Crew receive devastating news about their mining permits. The Dust Devils gamble big on a quartz reef. Shane and Russell strike gold. S5, Ep5

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Aussie Gold Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: A new crew are under threat from crocodiles and accusations of illegal prospecting. The Victoria Diggers receive some welcome help. S5, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: I'm a Rockstar, Baby! Meet Kelly Jay, the lead singer of a rock band, who has amassed a massive hoard from his travels. Now he must choose between his clutter and his loved ones. S4, Ep18

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: As Bad as It Gets. Meet Randy who is being forced to leave by his landlord. With only days to accomplish the task, he must somehow clear out the eight-foot-high mountains of stuff. S4, Ep2

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: New: Paranormal Caught On Camera
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Poltergeist Stalks Family. A phantom monk roams around a 13th-century church. Plus, a family moves and takes their poltergeist with them, and three UFOs fall in formation. S7, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: New: Ghost Adventures
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Whitmore Mansion. Zak and the crew investigate a mansion soaked in tragedy and bloodshed. Unexplained paranormal activity has the new owner desperate for answers. S20, Ep11

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: New: Ghost Adventures
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Montecito Mansion Of Mystery. The crew embark on one of their most incredible investigations at a mansion in Montecito, California. This historic home offers up shocking evidence. S20, Ep12

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Unexplained: Caught On Camera
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Abandoned Factory Phantoms. In Eastbourne, an invisible entity wreaks havoc on Tommy's CBD shop. A possible human experiment gone wrong is on the loose in Casper mountains. S4, Ep4

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Unexplained: Caught On Camera
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Man Who Died Three Times. After dying three times, Nick receives a paranormal gift too good not to use. A cat says goodbye from beyond the grave to his family in Georgia. S4, Ep5

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Pain Level Ten. An explosion rocks the Time Bandit, and an emergency sends Keith into rescue mode. Meanwhile, Jake disposes of pots to prevent capsizing. S19, Ep16

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Dead Reckoning. When Sig loses GPS navigation, Mandy must work a decades-old magnetic compass. OJ's replacement on the Wizard makes a misfit crew a bit more awkward. S19, Ep17

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Cooper's Treasure
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Columbus Treasure. The discovery of a lifetime becomes a massive salvage operation. Pulling up and verifying Columbus' anchor might be the biggest challenge yet. S1, Ep6

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Fortune Of The Buzzard. Josh Gates is on the trail of the legendary lost treasure of the notorious pirate, The Buzzard - a fortune rumoured to be over a billion dollars. S6, Ep17

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Expedition Unknown
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Lost Tomb Of The Mummy. Josh Gates investigates an active dig site in Egypt. He joins renowned archaeologist Dr. Zahi Hawass, who is on the cusp on an incredible discovery. S6, Ep19

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Alaskans Unite. Misty must complete her cabin roof without help from Maciah. Marty gives a cabin-warming gift to Mollee, and the family commit to a mini rescue. S1, Ep7

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Homestead Rescue: Raney Ranch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Twist Of Fate. With the first winter storm just days away, the Raney clan rush to seal in Misty's cabin. But a devastating fire threatens to derail their plans. S1, Ep8

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Right On The Mark. The Blacklighters' team leader, Mark, is severely injured in a mining accident forcing Paul and John to work overtime on two separate claims. S7, Ep18

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Outback Opal Hunters
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Good, Bad And Overcooked. The Cheals hit a massive pocket of plate sized opal in their open cut mine. Plus, Brutal Outback temperatures cripple Cozza with severe heat stroke. S7, Ep19

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Prodigal Son. An additional 15 million dollars in crab sends the fleet into a fishing frenzy. To get ahead, the Time Bandit and Wizard must put a decade old rivalry behind them. S11, Ep2

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Deadliest Catch
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: The Ultimatum. Huge waves test rookie skipper Josh, but it's fire not water that threatens to sink his Cornelia Marie. On the Wizard, a mutinous crew faces off with Captain Keith. S11, Ep3

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: My Deadly Face Tumor. In Sweden, Kim's had dozens of surgeries on a huge facial tumour, but stopped after he almost died. He needs one more operation - can he go through with it? S4, Ep9

DMAXUKPlus1.uk.title: Body Bizarre
DMAXUKPlus1.uk.description: Worlds Biggest Cyst. Khalida goes to a hospital in Kashmir after suffering intense stomach pains. Doctors operate and are astonished to discover the world's biggest ovarian cyst. S4, Ep10

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: The McQueens panic when the police turn up on their doorstep. The wheels are in motion for Donny's new business. And a confession breaks a resident's heart.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: Vicky struggles to decide what she wants for her future. A mother puts her foot down. And a couple are forced to face their feelings, but is it the end?

E4Plus1.uk.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
E4Plus1.uk.description: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Return to Amy's Baking Company: Gordon revisits the most contentious restaurant he's ever tried to rescue - Amy's Baking Company, in Scottsdale, Arizona. (S7 Ep10) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Pantaleone's: In Colorado, Gordon visits Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, whose stubborn owner Pete claims that he makes 'the best pizza in Denver'. Sadly, Gordon doesn't agree. (S7 Ep1) [SL]

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Fonzie Scheme: Murray is honoured for his business skills. Barry's scheme to steal golf carts goes off the rails. Beverly attempts to help Murray find a hobby. (S4 Ep21)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Day After the Day After: After watching a scary TV film, Barry begs Murray to build an underground bunker. (S4 Ep22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Written in the Stars: Phil thinks that Gloria is upset with Jay for dropping the ball on Valentine's Day, so he convinces Jay to spice things up with a little role playing. (S9 Ep14)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Wine Weekend: The family go on a wine-tasting trip, and Gloria and Mitch are invited to a party at Oprah's house - but they can't bring anyone else. (S9 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Old Neighborhood: Gordon visits Arvada in Colorado, where out-of-control hoarder Randy and his wife Alexa have allowed their restaurant Old Neighborhood to fall into disrepair. (S7 Ep2)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
E4Plus1.uk.description: Kati Allo: Gordon's in New York, where the stress of running a Greek restaurant has driven Manny and Christine to the brink of divorce, with their daughter stuck in the middle. (S7 Ep5)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Into the Woods: Peralta and Boyle persuade Jeffords to join them on a weekend trip to a cabin in the woods, but it isn't the fun excursion they'd hoped for. (S3 Ep6)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Mattress: Peralta and Santiago convince Captain Holt to let them work together on a case involving a new street drug, but their romance gets in the way. (S3 Ep7)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Milhouse Divided: When Milhouse's parents split up, his mum gets together with an American Gladiator called Pyro, his dad self-produces an album and Milhouse goes a bit crazy. (S8 Ep6/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Lisa's Date with Density: Lisa has a crush on Nelson. But can she get him to change his ways? (S8 Ep7/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: The Circle of Driving Again: When Murray insists that Adam must have driving lessons, the family learn something new about Pops. Barry visits Erica at college. (S5 Ep8)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Goldbergs
E4Plus1.uk.description: Parents Just Don't Understand: Adam and Barry write a song but don't get the reaction they were expecting from Murray. Beverly repeatedly calls Erica at college. (S5 Ep9)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: A Sketchy Area: Phil finds a new career after visiting Luke's college. Mitch's new case as an assistant DA is marred by an unflattering courtroom sketch by the resident artist. (S10 Ep3)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Modern Family
E4Plus1.uk.description: Torn Between Two Lovers: Haley struggles when she must choose between her past and present relationships. Manny returns to college while his girlfriend stays at Jay and Gloria's. (S10 Ep4)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: House Mouses: Peralta insults Hitchcock and Scully's work ethic, so they try to get involved in a dangerous investigation in an attempt to prove themselves. (S3 Ep16)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
E4Plus1.uk.description: Adrian Pimento: The precinct gets a new detective who's been on a 12-year undercover assignment with the Mob. Gina directs a video for Captain Holt. (S3 Ep17)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Brother from Another Series: Sideshow Bob (guest star Kelsey Grammer) is once again released from prison, into the care of his respectable brother Cecil (David Hyde Pierce). (S8 Ep16/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: My Sister, My Sitter: Lisa starts a new career as a babysitter. All is going well, until Marge and Homer employ her to look after Bart and Maggie... (S8 Ep17/25)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Hollyoaks
E4Plus1.uk.description: A discovery sparks a police search at the school. Dodger sets out to prove that Smithy is corrupt. Vicky's confidence is crushed. And tensions erupt over two clashing engagement parties.

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Simpsons
E4Plus1.uk.description: Lisa with an 'S': Homer loses a large sum of money playing poker with Broadway legend Laney Fontaine, who takes Lisa under her wing and transforms her into a showbiz kid. (S27 Ep7/22)

E4Plus1.uk.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off...
E4Plus1.uk.description: ...for Stand Up To Cancer: Jodie Whittaker, Paloma Faith, Munya Chawawa and Spencer Matthews recreate Prue and Paul in biscuit form, and make cake pops and a twisted New York favourite.

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: On Gogglebox this time: Strictly Come Dancing, Selling Sunset, Mariah's Christmas: The Magic Continues, True Story, How to Make It on OnlyFans and ITV News (No.10 Xmas Party). (S18 Ep13)

E4Plus1.uk.title: Gogglebox
E4Plus1.uk.description: Britain's sharpest armchair critics have been watching The Masked Singer, Trigger Point, Pam & Tommy, First Dates: Valentine's, Mary Beard's Forgotten Art, and Dragons' Den. (S19 Ep1)

Film4.uk.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
Film4.uk.description: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

Film4.uk.title: Babylon
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Margot Robbie and Brad Pitt star in Damien Chazelle's opulently decadent, satirical look at Hollywood in the 1920s as it teeters between the silent the era and the 'talkies'.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Wonder Park
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Animated adventure featuring the voices of Jennifer Garner, Mila Kunis, John Oliver and Matthew Broderick. A girl's imaginary theme park comes to life when her mum goes to hospital.

Film4.uk.title: Charade
Film4.uk.description: (1963) Cary Grant and Audrey Hepburn star Stanley Donen's stylish Hitchcockian comedy-thriller. When her husband is murdered, a woman discovers that he was involved in a huge gold heist.

Film4.uk.title: Romancing the Stone
Film4.uk.description: (1984) Comedy action adventure starring Michael Douglas and Kathleen Turner. An adventurer helps a bestselling author to search for her sister, who's been kidnapped in Colombia.

Film4.uk.title: 10 Things I Hate About You
Film4.uk.description: (1999) Teen comedy with Julia Stiles and Heath Ledger. A student is furious to discover her prom date was bribed by her sister to invite her. But confusion ensues when he falls for her.

Film4.uk.title: One Day
Film4.uk.description: (2011) Romantic drama. Jim Sturgess and Anne Hathaway star as friends whose lives intertwine and diverge over the years, after first meeting as graduates in 1988.

Film4.uk.title: Sleepless in Seattle
Film4.uk.description: (1993) Romantic comedy with Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan. A bereaved man gets another chance at love when his son puts him on a radio talk show.

Film4.uk.title: Fresh
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Adults only horror with Daisy Edgar-Jones. When date-weary Noa meets a guy in a supermarket, she thinks things are looking up. But he's oddly obsessed with not eating animals...

Film4.uk.title: A Banquet
Film4.uk.description: (2021) Tense body-horror with Sienna Guillory. A teenage girl suddenly stops eating, but stays the same weight... Could she be a monster from Japanese folklore who has a hidden extra mouth?

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Sherlock Holmes: Terror by Night
Film4.uk.description: (1946) Sherlock Holmes murder-mystery starring Basil Rathbone and Nigel Bruce. Holmes and Dr Watson are employed to protect a priceless diamond. But it's snatched from under their noses.

Film4.uk.title: Think Like a Dog
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Cheeky comedy with Megan Fox. A young science prodigy (Gabriel Bateman) invents a piece of tech that lets him and his pet dog communicate with each other telepathically.

Film4.uk.title: Kindergarten Cop
Film4.uk.description: (1990) Action comedy with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A tough cop goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. Tough? Ha! The kids'll take him down in no time.

Film4.uk.title: The Art of Racing in the Rain
Film4.uk.description: (2019) Touching comedy-drama. An ageing golden retriever (voiced by Kevin Costner) tells the story of his life with his best pal, a budding Formula 1 driver.

Film4.uk.title: Battleship
Film4.uk.description: (2012) Sci-fi action-adventure starring Taylor Kitsch, Liam Neeson and Rihanna. When aliens land spacecraft in the Pacific Ocean, only the US and Japanese navies can save Earth. Violence.

Film4.uk.title: The Last Stand
Film4.uk.description: (2013) Thriller starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, Johnny Knoxville and Forest Whitaker. A small-town sheriff and his inexperienced staff take on a drug cartel boss who's fleeing to Mexico.

Film4.uk.title: Bad Boys for Life
Film4.uk.description: (2020) Action-comedy starring Will Smith and Martin Lawrence. Just when Marcus is planning to retire, a vengeful drug lord's son shoots Mike. Can our dynamic duo beat the cartel?

Film4.uk.title: Lucky Break
Film4.uk.description: (2001) Comedy. James Nesbitt and Lennie James play inmates who see their prison governor's dreadful musical as a chance to stage a breakout. With Christopher Plummer and Olivia Williams.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: LumoTV: Getting Personal
Film4.uk.description: Lucindha Lawson shares the story of how she made history by becoming the first deaf Asian woman to win a gold for England in the European Women's Deaf Futsal Championship. [SL]

Film4.uk.title: Teleshopping
Film4.uk.description: Teleshopping.

Film4.uk.title: Broken Lance
Film4.uk.description: (1954) Western. A strict rancher (Spencer Tracy) treats his sons (Robert Wagner, Richard Widmark, Earl Holliman and Hugh O'Brian) as little more than employees, with fatal consequences.

Film4.uk.title: The Black Swan
Film4.uk.description: (1942) Swashbuckling adventure with Laird Cregar and Tyrone Power. Privateer Captain Henry Morgan tries to rid the Caribbean of pirates when he's made Governor of Jamaica. Bit rich.

Film4.uk.title: Criss Cross
Film4.uk.description: (1949) Muscular film noir starring Burt Lancaster and Yvonne De Carlo. A dame convinces her ex-husband, an armoured car guard, to come in on a daring robbery.

Film4.uk.title: Warlock
Film4.uk.description: (1959) Western starring Henry Fonda. A gunfighter is hired to protect a town from a raiding gang. But a vendetta could undermine him. With Anthony Quinn, Richard Widmark and Dorothy Malone.

Film4.uk.title: The League of Extraordinary...
Film4.uk.description: ...Gentlemen: (2003) Fantasy with Sean Connery. In an alternative Victorian age, can Allan Quatermain, Dorian Gray, Captain Nemo, Mina Harker and the Invisible Man avert a war?

Film4.uk.title: M3GAN
Film4.uk.description: (2022) Creepy-doll horror with Allison Williams. A robotics engineer simultaneously invents an AI dolly and takes on the care of her orphaned niece. But can a cyborg really raise a kid?

Film4.uk.title: Late Night with the Devil
Film4.uk.description: (2023) Unsettling found-footage horror with David Dastmalchian. A has-been host tries to save his 70s talk show using a demonically possessed 13-year-old girl. Really, what could go wrong?

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: The team are called in to save the survivors of a fatal crash and there's a bomb alert after Afghan asylum seekers are moved into a seaside hotel. S5 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
UAndW.uk.description: It's a day of firsts for the junior doctors. Claire confronts her fears with her first child patient, Tejas steps up to his first trauma case, and Adrian faces his first chest drain. S1 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Altered...
UAndW.uk.description: ...States: Love Without Limits. Louis travels to Portland, Oregon, and discovers a whole spectrum of non-traditional family set-ups: some that work and some that have been pushed to breaking point.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Lagos
UAndW.uk.description: Louis Theroux investigates the law and order of Lagos, spending time with both the so-called Area Boys gang members and the government's own paramilitary task force.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: Helping the contestants this time around are Matt Baker, Gyles Brandreth, Maggie Aderin-Pocock, Grace Dent and Mr Motivator. S2 Ep11

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Before the Fall: Investigations into an assault on a drug dealer lead the Sun Hill team to Jay Newman, whose family are in the care of the witness protection scheme. S27 Ep60

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: After the Fall: Eddie Olosunje suggests Jay Newman's death may have been suicide, but the discovery of the lad's stash of heroin suggests someone was after him. S27 Ep61

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Secret History: Part 1: Banksy is shocked to learn that his lawyer wife Naomi has been mugged by someone who appears to hold a personal grudge against her. S27 Ep62

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Secret History: Part 2: Banksy and Naomi are alibied for the serious assault on Henshaw. The case is re-opened after it turns out Finch was having an affair with Henshaw's mother. S27 Ep63

UAndW.uk.title: The Bill
UAndW.uk.description: Trial and Error: Part 1: Suspected rapist Tom Norris stands trial, but walks free after the victim's plucky effort to give evidence crumbles under tough interrogation. S27 Ep64

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point
UAndW.uk.description: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which four players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning its 10,000 pound jackpot. S10 Ep106

UAndW.uk.title: Tipping Point

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: A car crash victim has to be put into an induced coma at the roadside. Andy is called in to stand by as bomb disposal experts deal with a mortar dating back to the Boer War. S3 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: The response teams rush to save the life of a 21-year-old man who has been shot twice in the chest at a Doncaster pub. Another man has a seizure in the cab of his tipper truck. S3 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: 08: A doctor on his way home from work is left fighting for his life after a head-on collision with a truck. Leeds paramedic Chris is called to a motorcyclist who has been hit by a taxi. S3 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: 999 Rescue Squad
UAndW.uk.description: The teams stand by for casualties as police launch an armed raid on the home of a wanted man. A minibus carrying children with special needs is in collision with a stolen car. S3 Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: Nurses on the Ward
UAndW.uk.description: Renal nurse Neil treats a dialysis patient with a blood clot on the brain, midwife Amy delivers a baby with a falling heart rate and Matron Hazera's last shift isn't going to plan. S1 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: Nurses on the Ward
UAndW.uk.description: In Paediatrics, Mahbuba treats a two-year-old with a high temperature, while Cardiac nurse Rebecca prepares for an emergency admission. S1 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: The first ever episode of the hilarious comedy sketch series featuring a gallery of unforgettable characters, from the not-bovvered schoolgirl, to the foul-mouthed granny. S1 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: Look at her face, though... is she bovvered? It's the award-winning comedy sketch series with the very versatile actress. Bernie the Irish nurse is feeling a little romantic. S1 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: The Catherine Tate Show
UAndW.uk.description: The hilarious comedy sketch series co-written and performed by the very versatile comedy actress. Sketches this time round include Margaret the jumpy woman, plus Paul and Sam. S1 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: Emergency: First Time Medics
UAndW.uk.description: It's the Reading Festival, and the junior doctors have no idea what's in store for them - everything from a possible drug overdose to a mosh pit injury is possible. S1 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: A Place For Paedophiles
UAndW.uk.description: Louis gains access to Coalinga State Hospital in California, which houses more than 500 convicted paedophiles - most of whom have been deemed unsafe for release.

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Gambling in Las Vegas
UAndW.uk.description: Amiable everyman Louis Theroux explores the casino culture of Las Vegas. Meeting many of the local characters, Louis casts a wry eye over the gambling-obsessed city.

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: Assisting tonight's contestants are Harry Redknapp, Carol Vorderman, Nick Grimshaw, Andi Oliver, Tom Read Wilson, Angela Scanlon and Chunkz. S2 Ep12

UAndW.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndW.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: The Great Escape: Normally, nobody in the Harpers would willingly set foot in Nick's flat, but when Susan's mother comes to stay, it suddenly seems more attractive. S4 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Return of the Prodigal Prat: Sitcom. When the local paper announces Ben's death, he sees it as an opportunity to avoid doing all the things he doesn't want to do. S4 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Owed to Susan: Robert Lindsay and Zoe Wanamaker lock horns as the Harpers' marriage is threatened. Susan discovers that the love poem Ben wrote to woo her was not an original. S4 Ep5

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Deliverance: Chaos ensues yet again as Janey's baby is due, and Susan insists on travelling to Manchester for the birth. The journey throws up several blasts from the past. S4 Ep6

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Blind Justice: Ben discovers that juries can be just as blind as justice, and Susan is rendered temporarily sightless by a domestic discovery at home. S4 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: My Family
UAndW.uk.description: Friday the 31st: Frenzied family life with the Harpers in the show that's a surefire ratings winner. Susan decides to enter enthusiastically into the spirit of 'trick or treat'. S4 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Bran, Lexi & Gabbana: It's Christmas time at Fitzpatrick Referrals, and a Shih Tzu comes in with damaged discs in her neck, while an eight-month-old German Shepherd has a hip problem. S6 Ep11

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Kylo & Sasha: Kylo, a Rough Collie puppy from Glasgow, suffers from front leg deformities, while Golden Retriever Sasha also has a deformed foot where her toes haven't properly developed. S7 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Rolo, Astrid & Jeff: The practice has an unusual patient when ferret Astrid breaks her leg while doing a 'war dance', and puddle-loving Labrador Jeff has a developmental elbow disease. S7 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Dexter, Driver & Bailey: Noel treats handsome Dobermann Dexter, who has a serious spinal condition, and feisty feline Driver, who's been hit by a car, resulting in hip and knee injuries. S7 Ep3

UAndW.uk.title: The Supervet: Noel Fitzpatrick
UAndW.uk.description: Moon, Milo & Ollie: Eight-year-old Dalmatian Milo's squashed spinal cord causes him constant pain, and Noel attempts to fuse four-year-old Shih Tzu Ollie's elbow in order to save his leg. S7 Ep4

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: In a dramatic start to the new series, the West Midlands Ambulance Service treat a man who stabbed a police dog, a woman with a suspected stroke and a man on his fourth bout of pneumonia. S10 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: Hard-working ambulance crews help a shivering pensioner with possible sepsis, as well as a sparky 95-year-old who's had a fall. S10 Ep2

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndW.uk.description: A four-year-old girl has her droopy eyelid lifted, a rugby player gets his broken nose reset and a woman has an operation on her wrist after almost a year of agony. S1 Ep7

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Operating Theatre
UAndW.uk.description: Nick has an ultrasound taken from inside his body to find out if he needs open-heart surgery, and Irene has gel removed from her eye to make her see again. S1 Ep8

UAndW.uk.title: The Young Midwives of Essex
UAndW.uk.description: Literal Babies Delivering Babies: Mollie makes being a midwife look easy as she helps a woman give birth, but Mary is still getting used to the ward and doubts herself after a tough shift. S1 Ep1

UAndW.uk.title: Stacey Dooley: Face to Face with Armageddon
UAndW.uk.description: The journalist meets Americans prepping for an uncertain future, all with different concerns - from climate change and natural disasters to civil unrest.

UAndW.uk.title: Inside the Ambulance
UAndW.uk.description: Anna and Darren treat a woman suffering from terminal cancer. Laura and Kerry are called to attend a young man with a painful abscess in his throat. S13 Ep15

UAndW.uk.title: Louis Theroux: Law and Disorder in Philadelphia
UAndW.uk.description: The ever-intrepid Louis Theroux joins the Philadelphia Police Department as they patrol the most dangerous part of one of the most violent cities in America. Ep9

UAndW.uk.title: The Wheel
UAndW.uk.description: Michael McIntyre hosts the Saturday-night game show, joined by Richard E Grant, Saffron Barker, David Haye, Anneka Rice, Danny Jones, Jo Brand and Melvin Odoom. S2 Ep13

UAndW.uk.description: Contestants must hook the catch of the day as Australia's top chef Josh Niland reels them in with his unique skills, before setting a gnarly Mystery Box challenge. S15 Ep26

UAndYesterday.uk.description: Canada: Tim and Pru embark on an epic journey along Canada's Rideau Canal - a World Heritage Site - from the backwoods of Ontario to the nation's capital of Ottawa. S6 Ep6

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Wilderness with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Patagonia: Simon Reeve treks across the high mountains and treacherous ice fields of Patagonia, getting close to pumas and riding with gauchos, the cowboys of South America. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Indian Ocean with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Madagascar to the Seychelles: Simon's journey takes him spearfishing in Madagascar, through the slums of Mauritius and on to the Seychelles, where he visits the world's smallest national park. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: 1968 Ford Cortina: Derek waxes lyrical about a pristine Jaguar XJ8 and a Ford Model T van tests his driving skills. S8 Ep8

UAndYesterday.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterday.uk.description: Ford Cortina/GT Savage Estate: Derek travels to the Yorkshire coast to pick up a 1963 Austin J2 Paralanian campervan described as the Rolls Royce of campervans. S9 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: 'Allo 'Allo!
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: The Nouvion Oars: Despairing Rene Artois is caught up in more wartime escapades. Helga plans to marry Herr Flick in order to report his every move to General Von Klinkerhoffen. S6 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: 1924 Rover 9HP Tourer: Paul collects a cherished 1924 Rover 9 that's been in the same family since the 1950s and only had one previous owner before that. S8 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: 1954 Morgan Plus 4 Coupe: Derek heads north to pick up a 1954 Morgan Plus 4 coupe in mint condition and believed to be just one of three still on the road. S8 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Paradise Lost: Exploring a ghost town in Colorado, the remnants of an industrial enterprise in Puerto Rico, and a remote village on Cyprus. S8 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Abandoned Engineering
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: A Royal Deception: Exploring a jungle refuge concealing a story of royal deceit, nuclear bunkers infiltrated by outsiders, and a haunted hospital marked by scandal. S8 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: True Evil: The Making Of A Nazi
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Heinrich Himmler: An in-depth profile of Heinrich Himmler, the book-loving loner whose strange mystical beliefs drove him to carry out the most shocking act of genocide in human history. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Philadelphia to Gettysburg: Michael Portillo travels through Philadelphia, and pays tribute its most famous fictional son, Rocky Balboa. S1 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Wilmington to Fort McHenry: Michael Portillo reaches the boundary between the northern and southern states - the Mason-Dixon line. S1 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Suzuki SJ: Will and Gus want to do a 4x4, but their dream list of cars is short as they can't afford much on their budget. However, Will has a plan, and steers them towards a friend's Suzuki SJ. S2 Ep

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Morris Minor: Gus and Will want a classic Morris Minor, and they find an ex-police car in a lovely shade of blue. But the seller wants them to bid online - they can't pay and take it away. S2 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Flipping Bangers
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Skoda Estelle: Gus and Will want an 'Eastern Bloc' car to see whether the old Skoda jokes were deserved. Bidding low they win an orange Estelle, but how can they add any value to it? S2 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Joanna Lumley's Silk Road
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Iran: Joanna Lumley travels to the Islamic Republic of Iran, where she meets many people eager to share the culture and innovations of the Persian civilisation. S1 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Joanna Lumley's Silk Road
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Uzbekistan and Kyrgyzstan: As her Silk Road journey draws to a close, Joanna Lumley travels across the Central Asian states of Uzbekistan and Kyrgyzstan. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Atherstone to Moira: Robbie Cumming discovers a mysterious message in a bottle on the Ashby Canal and calls in to meet a mate who lives on an old narrowboat. S5 Ep7

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Coventry to Weedon Bec: Robbie Cumming takes a tumble at Buckby Locks in Northamptonshire and has a problem with his power supply and battery bank. S5 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Canal Boat Diaries
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Bugbrooke to Milton Keynes: A window gets smashed onboard the Naughty Lass and Robbie Cumming receives a soaking inside the very wet Blisworth Tunnel on the Grand Union Canal. S5 Ep9

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Mediterranean with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon Reeve embarks on the final leg of his journey around the Mediterranean, travelling from Morocco, across the sea to Spain, and on to Corsica and the French Riviera. S1 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Simon Reeve's South America
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon Reeve journeys through the remote northeast of South America from the spectacular Mount Roraima in Venezuela through Guyana, Suriname, and French Guiana. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Simon Reeve's South America
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon travels through Brazil, visiting a neglected indigenous neighbourhood in Manaus and meeting a nurse who was the only source of healthcare during the pandemic. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Classic Car Kings
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Lamborghini Espada: Irv restores a 1970s Lamborghini Espada for a client in the Middle East. Hidden structural damage and spiralling engine issues threaten the entire project. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Sunbeam Alpine/Daimler Sovereign: Father and son duo Paul and Charlie are off on a road trip to Northampton, to extract a Daimler Sovereign, and a Sunbeam Alpine and that's been languishing in a garag

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Porsche / Panda: Can the team finally smell profit when they sniff out a bargain Porsche? A DIY job on a Fiat should also keep the accountant happy but will it go to plan? S6 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Navy Ambo/Plas/Victor/Viscount/Lorry: Paul hits the road to collect an old navy ambulance that served its time as a holiday camper. S9 Ep12

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Manta/Berlinetta/TR7/BSA Bike: Dave travels to Bedale to extract a barn find - a 1984 Manta GTE which hasn't seen the light of day in thirty years. S9 Ep13

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Scimitar / Honda CBR: A super rare Reliant Scimitar GTC undergoes an expert recommission, leaving no bolt unturned. And a Honda CBR superbike from the 80s is in need of repair. S3 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Bugatti / Pedal Plane: The team are on the hunt to restore one of the greatest names in motoring history - the Bugatti. But with a strict budget they settle for a replica. S3 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Mondeo / MZ 250: The team take on a modern day fast Ford to see if a 'quick flip' could make a few quid and revisit a 3 year MG restoration project that's still not finished. S3 Ep3

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Teleshopping
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Great American Railroad Journeys
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Manassas to Jamestown: Michael Portillo arrives in Manassas, Virginia, scene of two crucial battles during the American Civil War. S1 Ep8

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Hitler's Supercars
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Documentary charting the rise of Nazi Germany's Silver Arrow Grand Prix and speed record cars of the 1930s.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Churchill's Bid to Abolish Britain
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: This ambitious, striking film tells an astonishing story which challenges our understanding of the Second World War and our perception of world-renowned leaders.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Secret Nazi Bases
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Darkened Turrets: As Hitler's shadow engulfs Europe, ancient castles across the continent fall under Nazi control and are transformed to serve the ambitions of the Third Reich. S4 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: New. Paul Merton and wife Suki Webster drive off for a holiday-at-home in Cornwall with spectacular sea views, beautiful beaches and a birthday trip to a vineyard. S2 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: New. Paul and Suki help with the restoration of a Romany caravan in the Cotswolds and visit the Rollright Stones before Suki joins an all-female Morris dancing group. S2 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: The Square Peg
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Wartime comedy. A bumbling council workman and his officious boss are drafted into the Army during the Second World War - and end up parachuting behind enemy lines.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Russia with Simon Reeve
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Simon's journey leads him to a commemoration of the Second World War in the city of Irkutsk, and he meets a Siberian community who worship a man claiming to be the reincarnation of Christ. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Paul Merton and Suki Webster arrive in Canterbury to pick up their cruiser and set off on their first-ever staycation on wheels touring Kent's coastline. S1 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Motorhoming with Merton and Webster
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Paul and Suki negotiate their motorhome under a low bridge in the rain in the Lake District after having a cup of coffee. S1 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Alfa / 2CV: A 90s Alfa with electrical issues lives up to its stereotype and the team revisit a road roller, four years on. They also tackle a French motoring icon, the Citroen 2CV6 Dolly. S3 Ep4

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Volvo / Audi / Hillman: The Restoring Classics team take Derek's advice when he sniffs out the rarest car they've ever taken on - the last remaining Hillman GT. S3 Ep5

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Land Rover / Argocat: The team lift the shutters on their biggest restoration to date in the shape of a Series 1 Land Rover. But does that mean record profit or history making loss? S3 Ep6

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Rolls Royce / Honda C70: The team fly the flag for King and country with one of their most luxurious purchases to date - a 1981 Rolls Royce Silver Spirit. S4 Ep1

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Shopping from Home.

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Sedalia to St Joseph, Missouri: Michael Portillo discovers the hidden pleasures of 19th-century railroad workers in Sedalia, before reaching St Joseph, Missouri. S2 Ep2

UAndYesterdayPlus1.uk.description: Ford Zodiac Estate/Toledo: Derek picks up a rare Ford Zodiac Farnham Estate, while Dave heads for an isolated tent in the Midlands to collect a Triumph Toledo. S5 Ep5
